title: HELPING HANDS - 211info
text: GLIDE SEVENTH DAY ADVENTIST CHURCH HELPING HANDS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides food, clothing, and firewood. Always accepts donations. 174 Abbott Street Glide, OR 974430079 Eligibility: Must meet USDA income guidelines Hours: Wednesday 10am-2pm Email (541) 496-3956 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 496-3956 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for information. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Photo ID AREA SERVED: Glide School District Services: Discounted Heating Fuel Donation Drop Off Points Food Pantries General Clothing Provision If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge.
